extDescription.message: Pinboard bookmarking with AI tags and summaries, a reader with translation and highlights, Markdown/EPUB export, and 13 site themes.

cmdReadLater.message: Quick save as Read Later (no popup)

cmdMarkdownPreview.message: Convert page to Markdown preview (no popup)

cmdSaveTabSet.message: Save all tabs as a Tab Set

uriTooLong.message: Request too long ($LEN$/$MAX$ chars). Shorten notes or tags.

urlWarning.message: This page cannot be saved to Pinboard (unsupported URL)

confirmLogout.message: Log out? Your API token will be removed.

aiUrlEdited.message: URL edited: AI generates from the originally opened page only.

aiErrorModelNotFound.message: The default model for $PROVIDER$ may be outdated. Pick a model in Settings

aiErrorHostPermission.message: No access to $HOST$. Grant access and retry.

aiErrorModelNotFoundHint.message: Visit Settings > AI to select an available model

pinboardErrorRateLimit.message: Too many requests, try again later

pinboardErrorTimeout.message: Request timed out, try again later

bgSetToken.message: Set your API token in extension settings.

bgMdPreviewNoContent.message: No readable content was found on this page.

bgMdPreviewTooLarge.message: Storage is full. Clear cached data in the extension's options (Storage), then try again.

mdPreviewOpenFailed.message: Couldn't open the preview. The page may be too large to store.

mdPreviewQuotaFull.message: Storage is full, so the preview couldn't be saved. Free up space, then try again.

storageIntro.message: Reclaim local cache space. These caches rebuild automatically after clearing. Your settings, credentials, pending saves and in-progress data are never touched.

storageNoneSelected.message: Select at least one category to clear.

storageClearFailed.message: Couldn't clear the cache. Try again.

mdEngineExtractingNoteJina.message: First-time extraction fetches from Jina's cloud (r.jina.ai). It usually takes a few seconds, depending on whether the page is cached, your network speed, and the page size.

mdEngineExtractFailed.message: Couldn't extract this page. Please try again.

mdEngineTabGone.message: Source tab no longer available. Reopen the page to use Defuddle

bgTabSetSaved.message: Pinboard: One more step to save

bgTabsSavedCount.message: $COUNT$ tabs sent. Click Save on the opened Pinboard page to finish.

bgLoginRequired.message: Please log in to pinboard.in in your browser first.

bgTitleSavedAiSkipped.message: "$TITLE$" saved. AI did not run; grant access via Settings > AI > Test.

notesEmpty.message: Select text on a Markdown preview page to highlight it or add a note.

notesUnknownHint.message: Reopen this page's preview and save a highlight to fill in the title and link.

resetTabTitle.message: Reset current tab settings to defaults

optRespectTagCase.message: Respect existing tag case (match most-used casing)

optShowSuggestTags.message: Show Pinboard suggested tags in popup

optShowAiSummary.message: Show AI summary button in popup

optShowAiTags.message: Show AI tags row in popup

optShowQuickRow.message: Show quick action buttons (Save Tabs · Batch Save · Markdown)

tagSyncPrewarmed.message: Prewarmed (background fetch every 15 min, instant popup)

tagSyncHint.message: Controls how your existing Pinboard tag cloud is pulled into the popup for autocomplete. Tags are read-only; nothing is uploaded back to Pinboard.

tagPresetsPlaceholder.message:
One preset per line:
Work: project, review, report
Dev: programming, tutorial, tool

tagPresetsHint.message: Format: Name: tag1, tag2, tag3. Each preset appears as a quick-add button in the popup.

optCheckBookmarkStatus.message: Show bookmark status via icon (check if current page is saved)

backupHint.message: Export/import your settings (API keys are excluded from export for security).

backupIncludeHighlightsLabel.message: Include highlights and notes in backups

backupIncludeHighlightsHint.message: Includes page URLs, titles, selected text, notes, colors, and timestamps in manual and WebDAV backups. API keys are still never included.

importApplyFailed.message: Import could not be completed; some settings may already have changed. Review them and try again.

importHighlightsSkipped.message: Imported, but highlights and notes were skipped. Sign in with the Pinboard account that created this backup, then import the file again.

webdavHint.message: Back up your settings to a WebDAV server you control (e.g. Nextcloud). Never includes API keys.

webdavPushNotWritable.message: Directory exists but upload was refused. Choose an existing writable synced folder, not the WebDAV root.

webdavTargetUnavailable.message: Target directory was not found or could not be created. Use a writable WebDAV folder URL.

webdavConflict.message: The remote backup changed. Pull it before pushing again.

webdavConflictChoice.message: The remote backup has changed. Overwrite it with this device's settings? (Cancel to pull it first instead.)

webdavPermDenied.message: Permission denied. Click Test to grant access

webdavPullConfirm.message: Overwrite local settings with the backup from $TIME$? Your API keys are not affected.

importPartial.message: Imported. Themes saved locally (sync quota full); reload to see changes

qsHint.message: Save the current page instantly via keyboard shortcut (without opening popup).

rlHint.message: Save current page as "Read Later" via keyboard shortcut. Automatically marks as unread.

batchHint.message: Save each open tab as an individual bookmark.

batchTagsHint.message: Multiple tags separated by commas. E.g. batch_saved, research

batchAiTags.message: Auto-generate AI tags for each tab

batchAiSummary.message: Auto-generate AI summary for each tab

batchAiHint.message: AI runs one call per tab and may be slow. On first use, Batch asks only for the listed tab sites and current AI provider.

batchPermDenied.message: The listed site permissions were not granted. Batch AI was not started.

batchPermConfirm.message: Batch AI needs access to these $COUNT$ sites for this run:

hintOpenAIBaseUrl.message: Change for proxy or compatible endpoint

optAiAutoTags.message: Auto-generate AI tags on popup open

aiCacheHint.message: Cached per URL, up to 200 entries (LRU). Set 0 to disable.

promptsHint.message: Customize the prompts sent to the AI. Use placeholders: {{title}} {{url}} {{content}} {{description}} {{lang_instruction}} {{separator_instruction}}. Leave empty to use defaults.

tagPromptHint.message: Leave empty to use the default prompt shown above. Must instruct AI to return ["tag1","tag2"] format.

summaryPromptHint.message: Leave empty to use the default prompt shown above. Use {{lang_instruction}} for auto language.

popupFollowHint.message: When enabled, the popup appearance matches the selected Pinboard CSS theme.

optShowBadge.message: Show unread count badge on icon

optTagSortByPop.message: Add a “sort by popularity” control on tag pages

optTagSortByPopHint.message: On pinboard.in tag pages, adds a "pop" control that sorts the current page’s bookmarks by how many people saved each link; click again to restore.

customStyleHint.message: Inject custom CSS into pinboard.in pages. Useful for changing fonts, colors, layout etc.

customFontHint.message: Applied to body on pinboard.in. Leave empty to keep default.

themePresetsHint.message: Click a preset to load its CSS. Adaptive themes follow your Theme (light/dark) setting.

saveAsThemeHint.message: Save current CSS as a reusable theme.

saveTabsTitle.message: Stage all open tabs as one Pinboard tab set (requires pinboard.in login)

batchSaveTitle.message: Bookmark every open tab individually (optional AI tags & summary)

optSyncEnabled.message: Use Chrome Sync for settings on this device

optSyncHint.message: This choice is device-specific. Enable it separately on each device that should use settings from your Google account.

syncApiKeysLabel.message: Sync credentials for this Google account

syncApiKeysHint.message: This is one account-wide choice, but only devices with settings sync enabled participate; other devices keep using local credentials. New users start off. If an upgrade finds non-empty credentials already in Chrome Sync, it stays on to avoid data loss. Synced API keys, tokens, passwords, and export credentials are obfuscated, not encrypted.

aiContentSourceLocalHint.message: Extract the main content of the page locally (offline, fast).

aiContentSourceJinaHint.message: Fetch cleaned Markdown via Jina Reader API (requires network; API key optional for higher quota).

jinaAuthFailed.message: Jina API key is invalid or expired. Open Settings > Jina Reader to update it.

mdImgEmbedNotHere.message: Embed applies to downloads only; this export keeps image links.

mdImgBrokenNote.message: $COUNT$ image link(s) failed to load in this preview and may not display after export; Embed packs images into downloads.

mdPreviewNoContent.message: No content was extracted from this page.

submitUriTooLong.message: Request too large. Shorten notes, title, or tags

saveAsThemeDisabledHint.message: Modify Custom CSS first to save as theme

customCSSOverlayHelp.message: Your CSS is appended on top of the selected preset. Leave empty to use the preset only; rules written here override the preset's rules of the same name.

optSaveFailed.message: Save could not be completed; some other settings may already have been saved. Review them and try again.

aiErrorTryWith.description: Button label on AI error card to retry with a different provider

syncMigrationFailed.message: Sync migration failed. Try again; if it persists, check available Chrome Sync storage.

syncConflictUseCloud.message:
Chrome Sync already has settings. Use the cloud settings on this device?

Choose Cancel to use this device's settings instead.

syncConflictOverwriteCloud.message:
Replace the settings in Chrome Sync with this device's settings?

Choose Cancel to leave Chrome Sync off.

jinaFreeTierHint.message: Free tier: 20 RPM. Add key for higher quota.

mdPreviewEmpty.message: No preview data available. Please use the Markdown button in the popup first.

freeTierTitle.message: Which providers offer free API access?

freeTierZhipu.message: — free GLM-Flash models, 1 concurrent request; international access via z.ai (email signup).

freeTierOpenrouter.message: — :free models, 20 req/min; 50 req/day (1000/day after a one-time $10 credit purchase).

freeTierTrial.message: — signup credits that run out (DeepSeek ~5M tokens; MiniMax ~30-day trial).

freeTierOllama.message: — fully free, runs locally on your machine.

freeTierDisclaimer.message: Provider policies change frequently. Information above is current as of 2026-06 and may be inaccurate. Always verify current limits at signup.

optUrlCleanOnOpen.message: Clean when popup opens (silent, with undo link)

optUrlCleanAggressive.message: Aggressive mode: also remove ref/si/igshid and similar

optUrlCleanCustom.message: Custom parameters (one per line, appended to default list)

optUrlCleanExclude.message: Parameters that are never cleaned (one per line, e.g. tag= to keep affiliate tags)

mdExportFrontmatter.message: Add YAML frontmatter to exported Markdown

mdExportImagePolicyHint.message: Applied when copying or downloading Markdown from the preview page. Can be overridden per export.

mdExportExtendedMeta.message: Include extended metadata (author, published, site, image, word count)

mdExportExtendedMetaHint.message: Adds these fields to frontmatter, the HTML byline, and webhook payloads when available. Turn off for byte-identical legacy exports.

optBgSaveNoClobber.message: Merge tags in background saves (Quick Save / Read Later)

optBgSaveNoClobberHint.message: When enabled, background saves read your existing Pinboard bookmark (if any) and merge new tags with existing tags instead of replacing them. This prevents accidental tag loss on duplicate URLs. Note: adds ~3s per save for the extra API call. Foreground popup edits always replace, so you keep full control.

obsidianInstallHint.message: Obsidian must be installed for the note to open. Your note is also copied to the clipboard as a backup.

obsidianClipboardFailed.message: Couldn't copy to clipboard, so the note wasn't created. Try again.

apiKeySecurityHint.message: New users keep credentials on this device by default. Existing cloud credentials may keep account-wide sync on after upgrade. Only devices with settings sync enabled participate; synced credentials are obfuscated, not encrypted.

batchRevokeHint.message: Older versions could grant access to every site. New Batch runs request only the listed sites; this button removes the legacy broad grant.

batchPermNone.message: No legacy all-sites access is granted

optWayback.message: Archive saved pages to the Wayback Machine

optWaybackHint.message: After each save, ask the Internet Archive to snapshot the page (best effort, never blocks saving). Sends the saved URL to archive.org; off by default.

optWaybackBatchHint.message: Batch saves can fire many archive requests at once; anonymous quota is limited.

optWaybackS3Hint.message: With a free archive.org account key, archiving uses the authenticated API: higher quota, server-side dedup, reliable results.

waybackSkipPrivate.message: Never archive bookmarks you save as private

waybackPermDenied.message: Permission for web.archive.org is missing. Turn archiving on again to grant it.

archiveLogNote.message: A successful submission does not mean the snapshot is instantly visible; the Wayback Machine usually takes a few minutes (sometimes longer) to index new captures.

archiveErrBlocked.message: the site or URL is excluded from archiving

archiveErrNoAccess.message: page not accessible to the archiver (paywall or login)

archiveErrDailyLimit.message: daily capture limit reached for this URL

archiveErrServer.message: archive.org server error; try again later

archiveErrRateLimited.message: anonymous requests are rate-limited per IP; try later or add an S3 key

archiveErrTimeoutHint.message: the request timed out; archive.org may be busy or the network slow

tagGovResetIgnoredConfirm.message: Clear ignored groups and re-show all duplicates?

tagGovAiNoKey.message: No AI provider configured. Set one up in the AI tab

tagGovNoLowCount.message: No tags with 1 use or fewer.

tagGovAborted429.message: Rate-limited. The batch stopped; completed items are saved. Re-running the same merge resumes safely (already-updated bookmarks are skipped).

tagGovLoadFailed.message: Could not load tags. Check your Pinboard token or network, then Refresh

tagGovSnapshotSaved.message: Tag list snapshot downloaded (names and counts; a reference for manual repair, not an automatic restore)

tagGovSnapshotFailed.message: Could not create snapshot; merge/delete blocked

tagGovIrreversibleWarn.message: Merges and deletions cannot be undone. A snapshot of your tag list (names and counts) is downloaded before the first change, for manual reference only.

tagGovBundlesWarn.message: Tag bundles on pinboard.in are not updated by renames; review them manually after merging.

optBgSaveModeMerge.message: Merge (default, combines new tags with existing)

optBgSaveModeSkip.message: Skip (if URL already saved, do nothing)

optBgSaveModeHint.message: Merge: reads existing bookmark tags and combines with new tags. Skip: avoids duplicate-URL saves. Overwrite: replaces tags entirely (foreground edits always replace).

previewAiSectionHint.message: Explain selection, Ask, and full-text translation on the Markdown preview page are user-invoked and use the AI provider and key configured above. If the opt-in key-points skim is enabled, it may run when Markdown preview opens; nothing runs as a hidden background task.

previewAiEnabled.message: Enable AI features on the preview page

previewAiEnabledHint.message: Turning this off removes every AI entry point from the preview page. Entry points are also hidden automatically when no API key is configured.

previewAiModelHint.message: Model name used only by preview-page AI features, on the same provider as above. Leave empty to use the provider's default model.

translateLangCustomPlaceholder.message: Any language name, e.g. Latin, Classical Chinese

translateGlossaryHint.message: One rule per line, in the form term=translation. Leave the right side empty to keep the term untranslated. Sent with every translation request.

selectionTriggerIcon.message: Explain button in the selection toolbar

trSkippedTargetLang.message: $COUNT$ block(s) already in the target language, skipped

trShowOriginal.message: Click to temporarily show the original

askPlaceholder.message: Ask about this article... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)

askEmptyHint.message: Answers cite the article paragraphs, so every claim can be checked.

askClearConfirm.message: Clear all questions and answers for this page?

askHistWindowNote.message: Follow-ups carry only the last 4 questions and answers.

secSendDestinationsHint.message: Each enabled destination appears in the preview page's "Send to" menu.

mdSendTooLongFellBack.message: Too long for a direct link; full text copied instead. Paste into {name} (Ctrl+V) to finish.

mdSentUrlScheme.message: Opened {name}; full text copied to clipboard

mdSendOpenBlocked.message: Could not open the app; full text copied to clipboard

mdSendNoneConfigured.message: No destinations enabled. Add one in Settings

mdSendApiDown.message: Couldn't reach the export server. Full text copied to clipboard; paste to finish.

mdSendApiBadToken.message: The server rejected the token. Re-copy it from the app. Full text copied to clipboard.

mdSendApiFailed.message: The export request failed. Full text copied to clipboard; paste to finish.

mdSendTestDown.message: Can't reach the server. Is the app running?

mdSendTestBadToken.message: Token rejected. Re-copy it from the app.

mdTargetGithubOnboarding.message: Create a Personal Access Token (classic) at GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Tokens (classic) with the "gist" scope, then paste it below. Each clip is saved as a private gist. Note: fine-grained tokens can't create gists yet, so use a classic token.

mdSendApiPerm.message: Access permission was denied. Full text copied to clipboard; paste to finish.

mdTargetWebhookOnboarding.message: POSTs a JSON payload {title, url, date, tags, markdown} to your endpoint. Any Authorization value you set is sent verbatim (e.g. Bearer <token> or Token <key>), so any auth scheme works. For n8n, Make, Zapier, Readwise, or any self-hosted receiver; no account is needed here.

mdTargetWebhookHttpWarn.message: Blocked: use HTTPS, or HTTP only for localhost, 127.0.0.1, or [::1]. LAN/public HTTP, malformed URLs, and URLs containing credentials are not sent.

hlDegraded.message: Position lost: the surrounding text changed, so this highlight now covers the whole paragraph.

hlOrphanNote.message: $COUNT$ highlights could not be located in the current page content; their notes are kept.

hlOrphanUnlocatable.message: This highlight can't be located in the current page content.

mdImgFixBtn.message: Try to fix this page's images

kbdHelpIntro.message: These shortcuts work on the Markdown preview page (not here in Settings).

kbdHelpHighlight.message: Highlight the current selection (H = last color used, 1-5 = pick a color)

hlFilterEmpty.message: No highlights match the selected colors

skimEnable.message: Generate an AI key-points summary on the preview page

skimEnableHint.message: Shows 3-5 key points at the top of the preview page. Each generation uses AI tokens; results are cached per article.

skimStaleNote.message: Content has changed; these key points may be out of date
